Description: MCU WiFi BLE 5 USB native Arduino+IDF (U1 - 53-pin castellated footprint)
EN pin pull-up reset circuit (to U1 pin 8)
GPIO2 strapping pull-up mandatory on C3 (to U1 pin 5 / IO2)
USB shell DC drain to GND EMC/ESD
ESP32-C3 3.3V HF decouple (to U1 pin 3 / 3V3 - placed <1.5mm)
Reset EN pin anti-glitch filter (to U1 pin 8)
USB shell AC coupling to GND EMC
Boot mode button - between U1 pin 23 (IO9) and GND
Reset button - between U1 pin 8 (EN) and GND
